subject: docs: expand README and create missing documentation files
body:
README was minimal (5 bullet points) and omitted most features:
InterestForm, ActivityCharts/ActivityTimeline, InstallInstructionsModal,
DebugBanner, hooks, utilities, accessibility, and test setup. Expanded
to document all 13 components, 3 hooks, 3 utilities, project structure,
environment variables, and commands.

Created missing docs required by CLAUDE.md conventions:
- SESSION_NOTES.md — session continuity context
- TODO.md — pending improvements backlog
- HISTORY.md — completed work changelog
- USER_ACTIONS.md — manual action tracker
- AI_MISTAKES.md — consolidated from docs/working/ai-fuckups.md

Tags: docs, documentation, readme, audit
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation-audit
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01Dua8Xbp3cH9mgvvtK9FuLo
